body_text:
20:14 â May 8, 2020
CEBA Settlement and Reconciliation â New Part
Settlement and reconciliation procedures are now available in the new Canada Emergency Business Account (CEBA) Part.
The CEBA program provides interest-free loans up to $40,000 to small businesses and not-for-profit organizations to help cover operating costs during a period where their revenues have been temporarily reduced due to the economic impacts of COVID-19. The loans are funded by Export Development Canada (EDC).
